zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard L Mason IV於1402年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾邱奇 斯特頓時，他的父親Lord Richard Lee Mason of Minton26歲，母親Lady Alice, Arundel De Burley32歲。他於1425年與Johanna Short在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1460年在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾邱奇 斯特頓聖 勞倫也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard L Mason IV于1402年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾邱奇 斯特頓时，他的父亲Lord Richard Lee Mason of Minton26岁，母亲Lady Alice, Arundel De Burley32岁。他于1425年与Johanna Short在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1460年在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾邱奇 斯特頓聖 勞倫也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Mason
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English masoun ‘mason, stone worker, builder in stone’ (Old Central French maçon, masson). A Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun) gives rise to Machin and its variants. See also Mayson . Stonemasonry was a hugely important craft in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Masson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Lucien, Alain, Henri, Pierre, Yves, Agathe, Aime, Cecile, Clovis, Francois, Francoise.

variants.name: Machin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Juan, Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Mario, Miguel, Pedro, Blanca, Diego, Luis, Ramon.
English: variant of   Machen  . This is the more common form of the name in Britain and Ireland.
Spanish (Machín): probably a nickname from machín ‘boor, lout’, often applied to a blacksmith's apprentice.

variants.name: Macon
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places so called, e.g. in Saône-et-Loire.
French: from the old oblique form of the ancient Germanic personal name Mako, a variant of Mago, a short form of compound names formed with maht ‘strength, power’ as the first element.
French (Maçon): occupational name for a mason, (Old) French maçon.

variants.name: Machen
meanings: English: variant of Mason , from the Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard L Mason IV was born in 1402, in Church Stretton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Richard Lee Mason of Minton, was 26 and his mother, Lady Alice, Arundel De Burley, was 32. He married Johanna Short in 1425, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1460, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in St Laurence's Church, Church Stretton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard L Mason IV est né en 1402, à Church Stretton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Richard Lee Mason of Minton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice, Arundel De Burley, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Short en 1425, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1460, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à St Laurence's Church, Church Stretton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard L Mason IV 1402 in Church Stretton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Richard Lee Mason of Minton 26 und seine Mutter Lady Alice, Arundel De Burley 32. Er hat 1425 in Shropshire, England Johanna Short geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1460 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Laurence's Church, Church Stretton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard L Mason IVが1402年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアチャーチ ストレットオンで生まれた時，父Lord Richard Lee Mason of Mintonは26歳，母Lady Alice, Arundel De Burleyは32歳であった。1425年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでJohanna Shortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1460年に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアチャーチ ストレットオンスト ラウレンセ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Laurence's Church, Church Stretton: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 처르치 스트레턴 스트 로렌스'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Richard L Mason IV(이)가 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 처르치 스트레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Richard Lee Mason of Minton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice, Arundel De Burley(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1425년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Johanna Short(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 처르치 스트레턴 스트 로렌스'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

ru.Saint Laurence's Church, Church Stretton: ст лоуренсе'с чурч, чурч стреттон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard L Mason IV родился в 1402 г. в местности чурч стреттон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Richard Lee Mason of Minton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice, Arundel De Burley, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Short в 1425 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1460 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности ст лоуренсе'с чурч, чурч стреттон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard L Mason IV nació en 1402, en Church Stretton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord Richard Lee Mason of Minton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Alice, Arundel De Burley, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Johanna Short en 1425, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1460, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en St Laurence's Church, Church Stretton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
